title: Scan Trending Topics
prompt:
Scan for trending AI/agent content across all available sources:

1. Use scan_trending to fetch from HN, Dev.to, Reddit, and GitHub (public APIs).
2. Use the xpoz-mcp tools to search X/Twitter, Reddit, TikTok, and Instagram for trending posts about AI agents, MCP, LLMs, Claude, agentic frameworks, and developer tools. Look for posts with high engagement.
3. Combine all results and store them using store_trending_topics_batch — pass the articles array directly as items. For social media results, format as: source='twitter'/'reddit'/'tiktok'/'instagram', title=post text (first 100 chars), url=post URL, score=like/upvote count, comments=reply count.

Summarize what you found and stored from each source.
